products.title: 42" Custom Sublimation Gang Sheet Builder
products.body_html:
Take full control of your print layout with our 42" Custom Sublimation Gang Sheet Builder from DTF Virginia. Easily upload, resize, and arrange your artwork directly on the builder to create a fully customized gang sheet that fits your production needs.

Designed for efficiency and flexibility, our builder lets you maximize every inch of your sheet by combining multiple logos, designs, names, or graphics into one seamless layout. Whether you're producing custom apparel, tumblers, mugs, promotional items, or full brand collections, the 42" format gives you the space to print more while reducing waste and lowering overall costs.

Every gang sheet is printed using high-quality sublimation inks for sharp detail, vibrant colors, and clean transfers that press beautifully onto compatible sublimation blanks. From small business orders to large production runs, our builder helps simplify your workflow while delivering professional-level results every time.

Perfect for creators, print shops, and growing brands, the 42" Sublimation Gang Sheet Builder makes it easy to create efficient, production-ready layouts without the hassle. Upload your designs, customize your sheet your way, and bring your ideas to life with bold, reliable sublimation prints.

products.title: Custom DTF Gang Sheets 46″ Builder
products.body_html:
Custom DTF Gang Sheets – Fast, Reliable Custom Transfer Printing gives you the flexibility and efficiency to bring multiple designs together on a single sheet. At DTF Virginia, our custom DTF gang sheets make it simple to maximize your print space while delivering vibrant, high-quality transfers for apparel, accessories, and promotional products. Whether you’re producing logos, artwork, or full-color designs, gang sheets are the cost-effective solution for bulk printing and creative projects.

Our service includes both custom DTF transfer gang sheets and custom UV DTF gang sheets, allowing you to choose the best option for your project. With vivid color accuracy, smooth gradients, and durable finishes, each transfer is built to last while maintaining its professional look after repeated use.

Perfect for small business orders, large production runs, or personal projects, our gang sheets save time, reduce waste, and give you the freedom to print multiple designs at once. The strong adhesive backing ensures that your transfers apply seamlessly to cotton, polyester, blends, and more.

Trust DTF Virginia to provide fast turnaround, reliable service, and professional results with every sheet. Get started today and transform your designs into bold, ready-to-press transfers.

products.title: Custom DTF Gang Sheets 46″
products.body_html:
Custom DTF Gang Sheets | DTF Virginia makes it easy to print multiple designs on a single sheet, saving time, space, and money. With our effortless online Gang Sheet Builder, you can upload, arrange, and customize your artwork in just minutes—giving you full control over how your transfers are laid out. No more wasted space, no complicated setup—just fast, reliable printing that gets your designs ready to press.

Our custom DTF gang sheets and custom UV DTF gang sheets deliver vibrant, high-resolution prints that look professional on any project. From custom t-shirts and hoodies to hats, bags, and promotional products, gang sheets are the most efficient solutions to bring your ideas to life.

Each sheet is printed with durable inks that produce long-lasting, wash-resistant transfers designed to stay bold and bright. They adhere seamlessly to cotton, polyester, blends, and more—making them perfect for personal projects, small business orders, or large-scale production runs.

At DTF Virginia, we focus on speed, quality, and convenience. Our builder is designed to get you from upload to print quickly while ensuring every sheet meets the highest standard. Start building today and turn your designs into stunning, ready-to-press transfers.

products.title: America’s 250th Anniversary Patch – 1" Circle
products.body_html:
Celebrate a historic milestone with our America’s 250th Anniversary Patch, designed for apparel decorators, event organizers, patriotic brands, schools, veterans groups, and commemorative merchandise projects. This compact circular patch is made for clean application, sharp detail, and long-lasting wear across a wide range of garments and accessories.

Perfect for honoring the United States Semiquincentennial, this patch adds a bold patriotic touch without overwhelming your design.

Designed for clean application and lasting durability, this small circular patch delivers sharp detail without overpowering your design. Its versatile 1-inch size makes it easy to place on sleeves, hats, jackets, backpacks, tote bags, and other apparel or accessories.

Whether you're creating merchandise for community events, school programs, veteran organizations, parades, fundraisers, or retail collections, this patch adds a timeless patriotic touch that stands out. The classic circular shape gives your apparel a clean and professional look while honoring America’s 250th Anniversary in a meaningful way.

products.title: UV-Printed Custom Leather Hat Patches
products.body_html:
Bring your logo to life with custom leather hat patches that add a bold, premium touch to any hat. Your design is printed directly onto high-quality leather or leatherette, creating sharp details and rich color that won’t fade or peel. The result is a clean, professional look that stands out without feeling overdone.

Unlike engraved or burned patches, printed leather patches keep every detail clear and true to your original design. No dark burn marks. No lost details. Just smooth, crisp prints that look great on snapbacks, trucker hats, beanies, and more.

Each patch is cut to your preferred shape, whether round, square, or custom. Built for everyday wear, these patches hold up through regular use while keeping a soft, premium feel. Choose genuine leather for a natural look or leatherette for a consistent finish—either way, your hats will look polished and retail-ready.

Bulk pricing is available, making these patches a smart choice for brand merch, team hats, events, and resale. If you want custom hats that look professional, feel premium, and make your brand stand out, custom leather hat patches are the perfect finishing touch.

products.title: UV-Printed Custom TPU Patches
products.body_html:
Upgrade your gear with our UV-Printed TPU Patches. Each patch starts with a soft, flexible TPU base that is molded into your custom shape. We finish it with high-detail UV printing that delivers bold color, sharp lines, and optional raised textures that look and feel premium.

TPU is lighter, thinner, and softer than PVC, so your patches stay comfortable without the stiff or bulky feel. It is also a great alternative to metal badges. You get a sharp, high-end look without the weight, cost, or rigid edges.

We can match your exact PMS brand colors, including metallic-style gold and silver. If you want extra depth, we can add 3D details or an embossed effect. The final result is a clean, modern patch that stands out on any product and holds up in daily use.

Each patch starts with a custom-molded TPU base, giving you clean edges and consistent thickness. Then we UV-print your design and cure it instantly with ultraviolet light for bright, durable graphics that stay looking new,  wash after wash.

These patches are flexible, durable, and weather-resistant. They work perfectly for uniforms, outerwear, backpacks, tactical gear, and apparel. You will see TPU patches on streetwear, outdoor brands, police and military gear, scout uniforms, and lifestyle merch because they look great, feel great, and are quick to produce.

products.title: Custom Glitter DTF Transfer by Size
Custom Sublimation Transfers by Size
products.body_html:
Our Custom Sublimation Transfers by Size make it easy to create vibrant, professional-quality designs for polyester garments and sublimation-ready products. Sublimation printing works by infusing ink directly into the fabric fibers, resulting in bold, long-lasting prints with no heavy feel or texture. Because the ink becomes part of the garment itself, your designs won’t crack, peel, or fade over time, making sublimation an excellent choice for sportswear, team uniforms, and performance apparel.

Sublimation works best on polyester fabrics, producing the most vibrant results on garments with a high polyester content. For example, 100% polyester will produce bright, full-color designs, while lower blends such as 65% polyester will create a softer, slightly faded or vintage-style look. This effect can actually enhance certain designs depending on the style you're going for.

Please note that sublimation printing does not include white ink. Any white areas in your design will appear as the color of the garment itself. For best results, we recommend using light-colored polyester garments. Simply upload your artwork, choose the transfer size you need, and let DTF Virginia provide a high-quality sublimation transfer ready for pressing.

products.title: Custom Glitter DTF Transfer by Size
products.body_html:
Make your designs shine with Custom Glitter DTF Transfers by Size from DTF Virginia. These premium transfers deliver a stunning glitter effect while maintaining the durability and flexibility that DTF printing is known for. Each transfer is printed with high-quality inks and finished with a sparkling glitter texture that adds eye-catching detail to your custom apparel and merchandise.

Our Glitter DTF transfers work on a wide range of fabrics including cotton, polyester, blends, and many other materials. Unlike traditional vinyl, DTF transfers are soft, flexible, and long-lasting. Once heat pressed, the design bonds directly to the fabric, creating a durable print that resists cracking, peeling, and fading even after multiple washes.

Ordering is simple just upload your design and choose the transfer size you need. Whether you're creating custom shirts, small business merchandise, or personalized gifts, DTF Virginia’s Glitter DTF Transfers provide a professional-quality finish that helps your designs stand out with extra sparkle.

products.title: Custom Fluorescent DTF Transfers by Size
products.body_html:

collections.title: Neon DTF Transfers - Ready to Press Fluorescent DTF Prints
collections.description:
Make your designs impossible to ignore with our Fluorescent DTF Transfers, also known as Neon DTF transfers. These vibrant custom heat transfers glow with neon-like intensity and give your artwork an electric pop that stands out on any apparel. Perfect for eye-catching graphics, bold lettering, and statement designs that demand attention.

Printed using advanced DTF technology and premium hot peel film, each neon DTF transfer delivers rich color saturation, sharp detail, and long-lasting durability. Your prints stay bright wash after wash and resist cracking and fading, so your apparel always looks clean, professional, and retail-ready.

Our fluorescent and Neon DTF transfers work on cotton, polyester, blends, and performance fabrics. Whether you are pressing custom t-shirts, hoodies, or athletic wear, you get a soft, flexible finish that feels great and wears even better.

From small custom runs to bulk wholesale orders, DTF Virginia makes it easy to add serious color impact to your lineup. Power up your apparel with fluorescent and neon DTF transfers because bold designs deserve bold color.

collections.title: UV DTF Transfers – Decals & Stickers
collections.description:
Shop high-quality custom UV DTF transfers designed for vibrant color, strong adhesion, and long-lasting durability. Our UV DTF prints deliver sharp detail and a professional finish, making them ideal for decorating hard surfaces without the need for heat pressing.

UV DTF stickers and transfer sheets are waterproof, scratch resistant, and perfect for glass, acrylic, metal, plastic, tumblers, packaging, signage, and more. The peel-and-press application process makes UV DTF transfers easy to use while maintaining strong adhesion and vivid color clarity.

Order custom UV DTF prints in the sizes and quantities you need, including individual designs and gang sheets. Whether you’re creating branded products, custom merchandise, or personalized items, our UV DTF transfers provide a fast, efficient solution with consistent results.

Choose the right size, upload your design, and buy UV DTF transfers online with confidence.
